title: Condensation polymerisation
summary: 9701 A Level — polyesters, polyamides, and repeat unit drawing with linkages.
learningObjectives: Draw repeat units for polyesters and polyamides.

simpleExplanation.title: Elimination at each link
simpleExplanation.summary: Two functional monomers react, eliminating a small molecule each step to form the polymer chain.

sections.content: **Condensation polymers** (35.1) contrast **20.1 addition**. Show **whole repeat unit** including linkages in brackets.
